main_poem: There once was a Galactic Ocean so bright,
With stars and planets in a celestial sight,
Galaxies colliding in a cosmic sway,
Black holes hiding secrets of the bay,
And in its depths, a mysterious bright,
recall_poem: There once was a Galactic Ocean so bright,
With stars and planets in a celestial sight,
Galaxies colliding in a cosmic sway,
Black holes hiding secrets of the bay,
And in its depths, a mysterious bright,

main_poem: In Forgotten Libraries, where books sleep tight,
Their yellowed pages whispering through the night,
Forgotten tales of a bygone day,
Dusty tomes holding stories of the day,
And in their hearts, a timeless, gentle might,
recall_poem: In Forgotten Libraries, where books sleep tight,
Their yellowed pages whispering through the night,
Forgotten tales of a bygone day,
Dusty tomes holding stories of the day,
And in their hearts, a timeless, gentle might,

main_poem: Where mystic winds carried a gentle, loving light,
Silent peaks keeping ancient secrets at bay,
And in its heart, an eternal delight,
recall_poem: Where mystic winds carried a gentle, loving light,
Silent peaks keeping ancient secrets at bay,
And in its heart, an eternal delight,
